observations.summary: Aviel's physical compression from years of hunching over his hoard parallels his psychological and spiritual decay, reflecting the motif of bodily manifestation of inner turmoil.

source_evidence.quote: Aviel stood. He was not a tall man—years of hunching over his hoard had compressed him, made him smaller—but in that moment, he seemed to fill the room.

observations.target_hint: Aviel's systemic decay and hoarding behavior as described in the narrative context and archetype protocols.
